title: The Best of Singapore and Malaysia Experience
details: Discover the vibrant cities of Singapore and Kuala Lumpur in this best-selling twin-city package. Enjoy iconic landmarks, Universal Studios Singapore, cultural tours, and seamless transfers while experiencing the rich blend of modern and traditional attractions.
flyer: assets/data/packages/asia/The Best of Singapore and Malaysia Experience/Flyer_1769999061.png

itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Singapore. Receive SGD 8 lunch voucher. Proceed to Singapore City Tour including Merlion Park, Parliament House, Esplanade, Padang, Supreme Court, National Gallery, Suntec Fountain, Chinatown, Hock Kang Temple, Mount Faber, and Gardens by the Bay (photo stop). Visit souvenir and chocolate shop. Hotel check-in. Optional tour: Spectra Light & Water Show at Marina Bay Sands.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/5D/3N The Best of Singapore & Malaysia Experience 2026/Day1_1764729301.png

itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at hotel. Transfer to Universal Studios Singapore. Enjoy full-day access to rides and attractions. Transfer back to hotel.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/5D/3N The Best of Singapore & Malaysia Experience 2026/Day2_1764729277.png

itinerary.day_details: Breakfast. Transfer from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur via SIC coach. Hotel check-in and free time for leisure.

Breakfast and free time. Hotel check-out. Afternoon Kuala Lumpur City Tour including King’s Palace, Independence Square, National Monument (drive-by), old railway station, Petronas Twin Towers (photo stop), and chocolate factory. Transfer to airport.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/5D/3N The Best of Singapore & Malaysia Experience 2026/Day4_1764729286.png

itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Manila. End of tour.

inclusions: 1 night hotel accommodation in Kuala Lumpur
One-way SIC coach transfer (Singapore to Kuala Lumpur)
extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱10,000 initial down payment; full payment 45 days before travel period.
